transcript: Speaker A: Melan... ab ye kaunsi bimari hai yaar? [Melan... now what disease is this, man?] Hmm... nahi yaar... na na na... Sia ko poochta hoon. [Hmm... no man... no no no... let me ask Sia.] Speaker B: Melancholic means feeling sad or gloomy. Speaker A: Oh! To ye matlab hai. [Oh! So this is what it means.] Aaj to Sia ne bacha liya. Agar aap bhi aisi situation se bachna chahte ho, to Speax download karo. Tap on the link below. [Today Sia saved me. If you also want to avoid such situations, download Speax. Tap on the link below.]
on_screen_text: Melancholic*; Milein SIA se Aapki personal AI teacher [Meet SIA, your personal AI teacher]; Melancholic means feeling sad or gloomy; Speax English
summary: A man gets confused by the word 'melancholic' while texting and fears embarrassment. He uses the Speax app's AI teacher, Sia, to quickly learn its meaning and reply confidently. He advises viewers to download Speax to handle similar situations.
